sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Pian'pih Mittaw Mi Khat Damsak

verses.text: Tua bangin Jesuh a paikhiat ciangin a pian'pih mittaw mi khat a mu hi
A nungzuite in, “Sia aw, hihpa a mittawtna ama mawhna hang ahi hiam, a nu a pate' mawhna hang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in, “A mittawtna pen ama mawhna leh a nu leh a pate' mawhna hang hilo a, ama tungah Pasian' vangliatna a kilat theihna dingin a mittaw ahi hi
Sun khuavak laiteng kei hong sawlpa' na i sem ding hi. Kuamah in na a sep theihloh zan hun zong hong tung ding hi
Leitungah ka om laiteng kei pen leitung mite-a' dingin khuavak ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua khit ciangin leilakah a cil sia-in buannawi bawl a, a mipa' mitah tua buannawi a nuhkawmin
“Siloam Bual-ah na mai va phiat in,” ci-in a sawl hi. (Siloam a cih ciangin, Sawl, a cihna a hi hi.) Tua ahih manin mittawpa zong va pai-in a mai va phiat a, khua mutheisa-in hong paikik hi
Tua hun ma-in amah ngettawm suangin a om a mu a vengte leh amah a mu ngei mite in khua a muhtheihna a muh uh ciangin, “Ngettawm suangin a tutu mipa hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Mi pawlkhat in, “Amah hi mah hi,” ci uh a, ahi zongin pawlkhat in, “Amah hilo hi; a kisun lel ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Kei pen tua mipa ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin
amaute in, “Tuapa na hih leh bangci-in khua mu theikik na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi

Amah in, “Jesuh a kici mi khat in a cil tawh buan bawlin ka mitte hong nuhsak a, ‘Siloam Bual-ah pai in la na mai va phiat in,’ hong ci ahih manin kei zong va pai-in ka mai ka phiat leh khua ka mu theikik hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua mipa koi-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh leh, “Ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Farisi Mite in A Damna Thu Kan

verses.text: Amaute in Farisi mite kiangah tua mittaw ngeipa a paipih uh hi
Jesuh in buan bawlin a mit a vaksak ni pen Sabbath ni ahi hi
Farisi mite in tua mipa in khua a muhtheih kikna zia thu dong leuleu uh hi. Amah in, “Tua mipa in ka mitah buan hong nuh a, ka mai ka phiat leh khua ka mu theikik hi,” a ci hi

Farisi mi pawlkhat in, “Amah in Sabbath ni tanglo ahih manin Pasian kiang panin hong pai mi hilo ding hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin pawlkhatte in, “A gamta khial mi in bang hangin hih bangin na lamdang bawlthei ding ahi hiam?” ci leuleu ahih manin mite' ngaihsutna kituaklo hi

Tua ahih manin Farisi mite in mittawpa kiangah, “Ka mit khua hong musak hi, ci na hih manin amah kua hi dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?” ci-in a dotkik uh ciangin, “Amah kamsang khat hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Jerusalem khua-a om Jew mi uliante in hih mipa a mittaw ngei hinapi-in tu-in khua mukik thei hi, cih pen um theilo uh ahih manin a mittawpa' nu leh pate sam uh a
amaute kiangah, “A pian'pih-a mittaw na cih uh na tapa uh hihpa mah ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh bangci-in khua mukik thei ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
a nu leh a pate in, “Hih mipa pen ka tapa uh ahihna leh a pian'pih mittaw ahihna thu ka thei uh hi

Ahi zongin bangci-in khua mukik thei hiam cihna leh kua in khua mu theisak kik hiam cih thu ka thei kei uh hi. Amah naupang hi nawnlo ahih manin amahmah dong le uh cin hong gen thei ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi

Jesuh pen Khrih hi, ci-in a gen peuhpeuh, kikhopna inn panin hawlkhia ni, ci-in Jew mi uliante in thukimna neikhin uh ahih manin, Jew mi uliante a kihtakna uh hangin a nu leh a pate in hih bangin a gen uh ahi hi
Tua ahih manin a nu a pate in, “Amah naupang hi nawnlo ahih manin amahmah dong un,” a ci uh ahi hi
Tua ciangin a mittaw ngeipa mah samkik leuleu uh a, “Pasian' mai-ah kiciamin a man taktak hong gen in. Kote in hih mipa thukham palsatin a gamtapa hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi,” a cih uh ciangin amah in
“Amah a gamta khial ahih leh ahihloh bangmah ka thei kei hi. Keima theih thu in: Nidangin a mittaw kimlai, tu-in khua ka mukik theita hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin amaute in, “Amah in nang bang hong cih a, na mit khua hong bangci muhsak ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
“A thuteng ka hong gen khitsa hinapi, ka thugen na um kei uh hi. Bang dingin za kikkik nuam na hi uh hiam? Note zong ama nungzui suak nuam na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin amaute in mittaw ngeipa kobawlin, “Nang pen ama nungzui na hi a, kote ka hih uh leh Moses' nungzui ka hi uh hi
Pasian in Moses a hopihna thu ka thei uh a, hih mipa ahih leh koi lai panin hong piang ahi hiam cih nangawn ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin mittaw ngeipa in, “Amah in kei khua hong musak thei napi, amah koi pana hong piang ahi hiam cih na theihloh uh lamdang mahmah hi
Pasian in thukham a palsat mite' thu ngailo a, amah bia-in, ama deih bangin a gamta mite' thu ngai hi, ci-in ko ka thei uh hi
Leitung pian' cila kipanin pian'pih mittaw khua a musak thei a omlam kiza ngei nailo hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian kiang panin hong pai hi kei leh hih bang hih theilo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin amaute in, “Mawhna bulomtang sung panin suakin a khangkhia mipa in kote tungah thu hong hilhsawm na hi hiam?” ci-in tua mittaw ngeipa a hawlkhia uh hi.
Hih mipa a kihawlkhiatna thu Jesuh in za ahih manin amah a muh ciangin, “Mihing Tapa na um hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Amah in, “Amah ka uptheihna dingin amah kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Amah na mukhin a, nang tawh a kiho mipa ahi hi,” a cih ciangin
amah in, “Topa aw, ka hong um hi,” ci-in Jesuh a bia hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mittawte in khua a muhtheihna ding leh khua mu thei-a kineite mittaw a battheihna dingin leitungah thukhen dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Ama kiangah a om Farisi mi pawlkhat in hih bangin a thugenna a zak uh ciangin, “Kote zong a mittaw-in hong ngaihsun na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in, “A mittaw hi le uh cin mawhna tawh na kipelh ding uh hi. Ahi zongin khua mu thei ung, ci na hih manun na mawhna uh a ngei mahin a omlai ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
